channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Childhood interrupted: Family awaits justice 8 years after baby was raped
item.description: A Delhi family is trapped between a stalled legal system, fraught family ties, and the struggle to protect their child.

item.title: Exclusive: Infiltrating Myanmar’s scam syndicates
item.description: 101 East goes undercover to expose the playbook of Myanmar’s notorious scam industry.

item.title: No school, living in a tent, but it’s exam time in Gaza
item.description: Dana Shabat, 18, has to walk an hour every day to go to a cafe to take her high school exams in the Gaza Strip.

item.title: Ronaldo, Portugal play Colombia in World Cup: Prediction, kickoff, schedule
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal and Luis Diaz's Colombia clash in Miami, with both sides vying for the top spot in Group K.

item.title: Could Israel’s coming election see an end to Netanyahu’s political career?
item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu faces mounting political, legal and US pressure ahead of crucial elections.

item.title: US, Iran trade strikes: What to know, will it unravel the MoU?
item.description: As the latest confrontations are aimed at control of the Strait of Hormuz, analysts say the deal is at risk of collapse.

item.title: Joy, disappointment, protests: A view from Egypt-Iran World Cup tie
item.description: Egyptians hail historic qualification as Iranians voice appreciation to Team Melli who may still make it to next round.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Saturday schedule, Round of 32 standings, predictions
item.description: Six World Cup games, knockout places on the line, Cape Verde make history and Iran wait for a place in the Round of 32.

item.title: Venezuelans dig for earthquake survivors as 72-hour rescue window nears end
item.description: At least 920 people are confirmed dead and more than 51,000 missing after two quakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 16: Spain, Egypt, Cape Verde advance to Round of 32
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Thai police arrest Australian over killing of teenager found in suitcase
item.description: Suspect was stopped at Bangkok's main airport as he allegedly tried to fly home.

item.title: Germany braces for record-breaking temperatures as heatwave moves east
item.description: Several countries including the UK and Switzerland have posted record June temperatures, with deaths reported in France.

item.title: Somali intelligence helps US arrest alleged leader of Minnesota fraud
item.description: US prosecutors reach into Somalia for a suspect in US fraud case.

item.title: Iran war day 120: Tehran condemns US strikes, says it violates MoU
item.description: US says it targeted Iranian missile and drone storage locations while IRGC said it hit US military sites in the region.

item.title: Who profits from Africa’s gold?
item.description: African governments seek greater control over gold, but much of its value continues to flow abroad.

item.title: Belgium reach World Cup knockouts as New Zealand exit tournament
item.description: A double strike from Arsenal's Leandro Trossard against New Zealand carried Belgium to top of Group G, ahead of Egypt.

item.title: Iran and US trade blame for attacks, threatening fragile ceasefire
item.description: Vance warned 'violence will be met with violence' while the IRGC says future responses to aggression will be 'broader'.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Which teams are in the World Cup round of 32, and what’s the schedule?
item.description: Cape Verde's stunning debut headlines the team list for the World Cup knockouts, which begin on Sunday in Los Angeles.

item.title: Iran wait on World Cup progress after late goal disallowed in Egypt draw
item.description: Egypt finish second with five points in Group G, while Iran finish third with three points.

item.title: Fishermen capture the moment earthquake hits Venezuelan coast
item.description: Fishermen have captured the moment twin earthquakes hit Venezuela’s La Guaira coastline on Wednesday.

item.title: Cape Verde becomes tiniest nation to make World Cup knockouts
item.description: Cape Verde erupted in celebration after the national team qualified for the World Cup knockout stage and made history.

item.title: US strikes on Iran test fragile ceasefire
item.description: The US has struck Iran for the first time since the two sides reached a Memorandum of Understanding on June 17.

item.title: Rescue efforts turn to recovery as aftershocks shake Venezuela
item.description: Rescue workers in one Caracas neighbourhood say no help has arrived, two days after twin quakes tore through the city.

item.title: Spain beat Uruguay 1-0 to clinch World Cup Group H top spot
item.description: Spain wins World Cup group, beating Uruguay 1-0 as Fernando Muslera’s error sends two-time champions home.
